chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 345 of 2010 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.322/2010 2. For hearing of main case 23.02.2023 Mr. Ejaz Ahmed, advocate for respondent ********** None present on behalf of the applicant nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing and such conduct reflects that the applicant is not interested in pursuing this case. Matter pertains to the years 2010 and cannot be kept pending as per directions issued by the National Judicial Policy Making Committee and reiterated by the Circular of honourable Chief Justice. [ In view of such position the instant Income Tax Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application (s). J U D G E J U D G E Amjad/PA
